function.name: run_tau_loop2_fixture
function.description: Run one fixture Tau loop from a Loop2 repair-node contract and return the JSON command result. This proves wiring only.

contract_path.description: Absolute path to a loop2.repair_node_contract.v1 JSON file with backend=fixture.

loop2_src.description: Absolute path to the Loop2 src directory containing the loop2 package.

function.name: validate_tau_loop2_receipt
function.description: Validate a Tau-emitted Loop2 receipt run directory against Loop2 contracts and Tau artifact invariants.

run_dir.description: Absolute path to the Tau Loop2 run directory.

loop2_src.description: Absolute path to the Loop2 src directory containing the loop2 package.

function.name: check_tau_loop2_monitor
function.description: Check the four Loop2 monitor endpoints for one Tau Loop2 run directory.

run_dir.description: Absolute path to the Tau Loop2 run directory.

function.name: inspect_tau_loop2_run
function.description: Inspect one Tau Loop2 run directory and optionally include Loop2 contract validation in the summary.

run_dir.description: Absolute path to the Tau Loop2 run directory.

loop2_src.description: Absolute path to the Loop2 src directory containing the loop2 package.

validate.description: Whether to include Loop2 contract validation.

function.name: validate_native_loop2_run
function.description: Validate artifacts emitted by the native Loop2 runner, not the Tau adapter.

run_dir.description: Absolute path to a native Loop2 run directory.

loop2_src.description: Absolute path to the Loop2 src directory containing the loop2 package.
